case_title: BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. VS. JAMES CIARDELLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-05-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100024995) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-05-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIARDELLO, JAMES $4,474.77 PRINCIPAL, $850.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $245.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,569.77, SEE SCANNED DOC
